parsed_review.summary: CP00-422 is a descriptor-only pack covering 10 RP13.P09.M08 "Hermes Evidence Packet" rows (RP13.P09.M08.S02-S11, risk A). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level claim is supported and no boundary is violated. Scope alignment: closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest.json, review-baseline.json, contract current_pack/p09_hermes_slice_descriptor/historical_pack_bindings tail, registry PAYMENTS_CORE_CP422_PACK_BINDING, and cp422_requirements all agree on pack_id, risk A, unit_count 10, range, deliverable mix {claude_review:1,security_audit:2,test:1,ui:1,implementation:5}, and handoff to CP00-423 / RP13.P09.M08.S12. Descriptor-only boundary is enforced: service.js freezeCp422Result stamps every object with the no-write/no-runtime/no-leak flag set (no payments/matching/AR/journal runtime, no DB rows, no object storage, no hermes runtime receipt, no state/audit writes), and all 10 case-set rows are descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false. Manifest production_ready:false and runtime_ready:false are honest; production_ready_flag is scoped to descriptor verification only. Authority boundary preserved: claude_is_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false across descriptor, contract projection, and no-write attestation. Hermes is used only for a deterministic descriptor packet/receipt (receipt_shape "...no_write", emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. CP178+ review hardening is present: forbidden_review_evidence rejects auth failures, zero-byte, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, disabled tools, and missing required fields; allowed tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob. Tests (model.test.js) and validate-rp13-payments-core-contract.mjs independently assert coverage, descriptor validity, evidence packets, handoff, and contract-projection deepEqual; command-evidence.json reports all implementation/plan/repo gates (incl. npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, git diff --check) at exit 0, corroborated by source inspection. index.js re-exports all CP422 functions via export *, satisfying index_export_check without a file change. Absence of post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) is the expected pending-review state per the hardening sequence, not a defect. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; no real client/matter/payment data and no leak surfaces detected. Final enterprise-trust approval remains a human responsibility outside this read-only review.
